name: Cytisine (nicotinic agonist)
description: Cytisine (nicotinic agonist) is classified here as quinolizidine alkaloid. This record is retained because it appears in psychoactive/traditional-use contexts, but supporting references and source-linked occurrence data are currently incomplete. Reported effects in existing notes include Delirium, nausea, visionary trance.
summary: Cytisine (nicotinic agonist) is tracked as nicotinic receptor agonist in this dataset. Evidence in the current record is limited, so pharmacology details should be treated as provisional.
categoryUseContext: Natural occurrence context is currently under-documented in this record; botanical source attribution requires verification.
